title: FYI ГўВЂВ” May 2022
body_text:
FYI ГўВЂВ” May 2022
FYI ГўВ”ВЂ May 2022
The following updates were made to the Payment Solutions Manual.
Access and Administration Volume
Central 1ГўВЂВ™s File Specifications Part
Section 1.4, File Specifications Document Library
We added Wires Data Extract Service File Specifications, Form 9327.
Section 5.14, Wires Data Extract Service File Specifications
We added this section to describe the Wires Data Extract Service.
Bill Payments Volume
Bill Payment Remittance Processing (BPRP) Part
Section 1.4, BPRP Document Library
We added Provincial Central Letter of Direction ГўВЂВ“ Bill Payment Remittance Processing, Form 9215.
Section 6.5, Obtaining a Corporate Creditor Agreement
We clarified when a single Corporate Creditor Agreement can be used.
Central 1 Banking Services Volume
CEBA Loan Repayments, Administration Fees, Settlement, and Reconciliation Part
Section 2.2, Frequently Asked Questions
We revised the response to Question #4 to indicate that the payment date (even for previous payments made outside of the current reporting period) is to be reported as the current date within the current reporting period.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Wires Part
Section 1.7, Wires Document Library
We updated the name of the Wires Data Extract Service Specification, Form 9327, to Wires Data Extract Service File Specifications, Form 9327.
Section 4.4, Wires Data Extract Service
We removed references that the Wires Data Extract Service is available to BC, Manitoba, and Ontario credit unions and other Central 1 Clients only. The service is now available to all clients.
We updated the Wires Data Extract Service Request, Form 2592, image with the updated form.
We updated the Wires Data Extract Service File Specifications, Form 9327, form name in the Related Information section.
Section 15.4, Completing the Outgoing Wire Request, Form 1171
We removed references that the Wires Data Extract Service is available to BC, Manitoba, and Ontario credit unions and other Central 1 Clients only. The service is now available to all clients.
Section 16.5, Completing the Sender Section
We removed references that the Wires Data Extract Service is available to BC, Manitoba, and Ontario credit unions and other Central 1 Clients only. The service is now available to all clients.
Section 16.6, Completing the Beneficiary Section
We removed references that the Wires Data Extract Service is available to BC, Manitoba, and Ontario credit unions and other Central 1 Clients only. The service is now available to all clients.
Document Library
Status
Wires Data Extract Service Request
2592
We removed references that the Wires Data Extract Service is available to BC, Manitoba, and Ontario credit unions and other Central 1 Clients only. The service is now available to all clients.
We removed the Changes to transit number(s) fields from the Setup Information section as subscriptions are at an organizational level.
Revised
Wires Data Extract Service File Specifications
9327
We updated the form name from ГўВЂВњWires Data Extract Service SpecificationГўВЂВќ to ГўВЂВњWires Data Extract Service File SpecificationsГўВЂВќ.
We reorganized the content and made the following changes:
Renamed the Introduction Chapter and updated the service description.
Removed the update summary as all financial institutions are receiving the updated file.
Moved the service availability information to a separate Chapter.
Added a new Chapter for the file naming convention.
Revised
Questions
Central 1, Client Support Services, phone
1-888-889-7878
, Option 1, email
support@central1.com
.
